user.title: Connect to Effira OPTi
user.description: Enter your Effira API key details. After validation, you can choose which installation to control.

data_description.key_id: The keyId returned when you created your API key.
data_description.key_secret: The secret returned when you created your API key.

pick_asset.title: Select installation
pick_asset.description: Choose which Effira OPTi installation to control.

error.invalid_auth: The API key could not be validated.
error.cannot_fetch_assets: Could not fetch your installations from Effira. Please try again.

abort.already_configured: This Effira OPTi asset is already configured.
abort.no_assets: No Effira OPTi installations found for your account.
